description:
Operating Area: Croatia

Queen Eleganza is one of Croatia's finest vessels accommodating up to 34 guests in 17 staterooms.She is one of the very few large yachts in Croatia with next-day turnaround, and a specialist for northern Adriatic VIP experiences and kosher cousine.

crew.name: Ivan Brnas
crew.bio:
Professional Background:
Ivan is the owner of Queen Eleganza and an experienced Hotel Manager who has been a supportive and helpful team member since the yacht's launch in 2018. Ivan has extensive knowledge of all onboard systems and plays a crucial role in providing guests with exceptional service during their stay onboard.

Personal Interests:
Ivan was a construction company director before investing in yachts, gaining experience across Europe and the Middle East. Although construction is his first love, his complete focus is now on yachts. During the off-season, he enjoys spending time with his wife and 4-year-old daughter.

Languages Spoken:
English, Croatian

Testimonial:
The whole family – including 3 adult sons (one of whom is a yacht designer) thoroughly loved our time onboard Queen Eleganza. 
We could not be more complimentary about the yacht, the Captain and crew, and Ivan, who was tremendous onboard and helped ensure that we enjoyed every minute of our stay.

crew.name: Vjeko Zemunik
crew.bio:
Professional Background:
Originating from Split, Croatia, our maritime professional boasts 15 years of experience, certified as a captain for vessels up to 500 GT and Chief Engineer for engines up to 750 kW. He previously captained the MS Adriatic Princess and became the captain of Queen Eleganza during the 2022 season. Known for his dedication, professionalism, and adept problem- solving skills, he also holds various certificates, including STCW II/3, III/4, VI/3, and II/4. A valuable asset with a proven track record in passenger ships and yacht operations, he possesses an intimate knowledge of the Croatian coast, spanning from the enchanting north in Istria to the captivating south. 

Personal Interests:
In his free time, he enjoys spending time with his daughter and wife. He is a history enthusiast, especially in naval battles. His wheelhouse is always open, and when you start topics such as history, World War II, and the like, the conversation will last for hours.

Languages Spoken:
English, Croatian

crew.name: Sara Stanković
crew.bio:
Professional Background:
Chief Stewardess on Queen Eleganza since 2023, she oversees the stewardess team and ensures smooth operations. She completed the European Bartender School, specializing in mixology.

Personal Interests:
Her passion is mixology, although she studied graphic design. Additionally, if there's a need to create any set design on the boat, Sara is the right person for it. She inherited her talent for this from her mother, one of Croatia's best-set designers.

Languages Spoken:
English, Croatian

Service Philosophy:
Leadership, Passion for excellence, and Attention to detail - dedicated to delivering high- quality service.

crew.name: Nedjeljko Vujačić
crew.bio:
Professional Background:
Embarking on the 2024 season, Chef Nedjeljko graces Queen Eleganza with his culinary expertise. Currently holding the esteemed role of Chef De Partie at the two Michelin-starred 180° by Matthias Diether, his previous experience includes the position of Sous Chef at River Advice and Restaurant Magacin. His arrival signifies a commitment to gastronomic excellence, promising a delightful infusion of flavors aboard the Queen Eleganza.

Personal Interests:
Love to explore new food, flavors and combinations. To build and improve constantly culinary experience.

Languages Spoken:
English, Serbian

Signature Dish:
• Burned Mackerel ceviche
• Veal cheeks in red wine
• Veal tenderloin with glazed sweet bread

crew.name: Boško Stanković
crew.bio: With a rich background in Serbian, Italian, and Mediterranean cuisines, Boško Stanković brings exceptional skill to plating and presentation. He is dedicated to crafting dishes that are not only delicious but also visually stunning, taking pride in the artistry involved in culinary creation.

crew.name: Danijel Bogović
crew.bio: Danijel Bogovič brings a decade of expertise in the maritime industry to his role as a deckhand. He is responsible for all deck-related tasks on the yacht, ensuring smooth operations and safety. Fluent in English, Danijel is a reliable communicator and a key team member. Notably, his brother serves as the captain of the sister ship to the Queen Eleganza, deepening Danijel's ties to maritime professions.

crew.name: Šime Matolič
crew.bio: Since 2021, Šime Matolič has been a dedicated deckhand on the Queen Eleganza. He is entrusted with maintaining the yacht's cleanliness, ensuring it meets the highest standards. Fluent in English, Šime communicates effectively with guests and crew alike. Ambitious and forward-thinking, he harbors a strong desire to ascend to the role of captain in the future.

crew.name: Andrija Mihajlović
crew.bio: With over 3 years of experience in Michelin guide restaurant in Belgrade and fast-paced bars, Andrija brings a wealth of knowledge and skill to our team. Attentive and detail-oriented, he ensures every guest has the best possible experience. Having completed a course in nutritionism in Belgrade, Andrija adds a unique expertise to his culinary and service skills. In his free time, he is an athlete specializing in martial arts, which gives him the endurance to go above and beyond in his duties.

crew.name: Dragan Milić
crew.bio: With over 10 years of experience in the hospitality industry, Dragan brings exceptional expertise to our team. He has worked in the luxury resort Dukley Gardens in Budva, Montenegro, and served as Head Bartender at Plato restaurant in Belgrade. His extensive background in luxury hospitality enables him to maintain the highest standards of service with a smile, and he has a keen ability to anticipate guests' needs before they even ask. Fluent in English, Dragan ensures seamless communication and an outstanding experience for all our guests.

crew.name: Elizabeta Mikolić
crew.bio: Elizabeta is a seasoned professional with over 5 years of dedicated service in the yachting industry. She is committed to enhancing guest comfort by creating welcoming and comfortable cabins. As head of cabin cleaning, she ensures impeccable cleanliness and presentation. Her efficiency and reliability are unparalleled, making her an invaluable asset to the crew.
